name: Pattas
method: Start by washing the meat and cutting the pork belly into very small
Cut the pork leg into four pieces so that it will fit in the pot.
Clear the kettle, refill it with fresh water, bring it back to a boil, and
Hold it on the stove for 2 to 3 hours.
Return the meat to the pan, boneless, season with salt, spice, the juice
of two lemons, and the chili peppers.
